name: fusion-electronics
description: Adds Fusion Electronics command and EAGLE export automation tools to Codex through Fusion's local MCP server.

interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to Autodesk Fusion's local MCP server and adds Electronics-specific command discovery, command execution, raw text-command execution, EAGLE export, and advanced Python hooks while forwarding Autodesk's original Fusion tools.
defaultPrompt: Use Fusion Electronics to list available Electronics commands in the active Fusion document.
Use Fusion Electronics to export the active schematic or PCB as EAGLE files, then inspect the result.
Use Fusion Electronics to start a safe Electronics command and verify the active design state.
